title: Work and the Economy
summary: This chapter was merged into Florida Chapter 9: Private Institutions: Family and Work. The standalone chapter on work and the economy — covering economic systems, globalization, and work in the United States — was eliminated and compressed alongside marriage and family. See Chapter 14 for a detailed comparison.

changes.original_text: Chapter 18: Work and the Economy was merged into Florida Chapter 9. The standalone treatment of economic systems and labor was eliminated.
changes.context: Entire chapter merged with Chapter 14 into Florida Ch 9. See Chapter 14 comparison for details.
